SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2014 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASSALLO, LOUIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VASALLO, VICTORIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
